section_name: Designation of agency to perform screening interview and treatment program
chapter_title: Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants
text:
A court may designate a single agency or organization to perform the screening interviews and treatment programs described in ORS 813.021 (Requirements for screening interview and treatment program) and 813.260 (Designation of agencies to perform screening interviews) (1) when the Director of the Oregon Health Authority certifies that:

(1) An agency or organization may accept such designations due to the lack of alternative agencies or organizations in the service area; or

(2) An agency or organization has applied to and been authorized by the Oregon Health Authority to operate a demonstration project that combines screening interviews and treatment programs. The authority shall by rule set forth the conditions under which a demonstration project may be authorized. [1991 c.557 §2; 1999 c.126 §4; 2009 c.595 §1141; 2015 c.318 §49]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 813. Driving Under the Influence of Intoxicants
##### § 813.025 — Designation of agency to perform screening interview and treatment program

A court may designate a single agency or organization to perform the screening interviews and treatment programs described in ORS 813.021 (Requirements for screening interview and treatment program) and 813.260 (Designation of agencies to perform screening interviews) (1) when the Director of the Oregon Health Authority certifies that:

(1) An agency or organization may accept such designations due to the lack of alternative agencies or organizations in the service area; or

(2) An agency or organization has applied to and been authorized by the Oregon Health Authority to operate a demonstration project that combines screening interviews and treatment programs. The authority shall by rule set forth the conditions under which a demonstration project may be authorized. [1991 c.557 §2; 1999 c.126 §4; 2009 c.595 §1141; 2015 c.318 §49]

An agency or organization may accept such designations due to the lack of alternative agencies or organizations in the service area; or

An agency or organization has applied to and been authorized by the Oregon Health Authority to operate a demonstration project that combines screening interviews and treatment programs. The authority shall by rule set forth the conditions under which a demonstration project may be authorized. [1991 c.557 §2; 1999 c.126 §4; 2009 c.595 §1141; 2015 c.318 §49]
